name: Salsa Pork Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice in a medium-size saucepan according to package directions, omitting butter, oil or margarine.
2. After the rice has cooked for 18-19 minutes, heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add pork chops and cook for 2 minutes per side or until no longer pink at the center. Remove to one side of a serving platter.
3. Put tomatoes in the skillet and heat through.
4. To serve, mound rice on a serving platter. Top with pork chops. Spoon tomatoes and sprinkle cilantro over all.
